ratings.comment: Professor Nelson is a truly engaging and passionate teacher. She really knows what she is talking about, and gets the students excited about the material as well. I will say, the grading in this class was way harder than expected for so few assignments, even when following the example, but other than that, I would love to take this class again!

Professor Nelson had great lectures that were interesting and easy to follow along! She was very approachable and accommodating as well. I did hear that there was a lot of grading discrepancies between TAs, and there weren't a ton of assignments to work with. But overall I highly recommend the class for STEM majors!

Her lectures were engaging and interesting, with a clear format that made studying for the midterm and final easier. Assignments and exams were graded fairly and were a good summary of the comprehensive ideas in the class. This is a great class to take along with a more demanding schedule, especially for STEM majors.

Professor Nelson is an amazing and passionate instructor! She makes participation exciting in lecture, and utilizes technology well. Her lectures and notes are simple to understand, and the class itself is extremely interesting while not being difficult. My only complaint is she often has to exceed a couple minutes beyond class to finish material.

Prof. Nelson's lectures were very organized and easy to follow! The class material is very easy to understand but you're only graded on a few assignments and exams so you have to do well on everything. The exams were pretty easy but sometimes had some questions that were very specific. Overall would recommend taking this class with Prof. Nelson!

Her lectures are seamless and are easy to follow and understand. Seems very sweet and approachable. Her exams are oddly particular and difficult even though the subject material is easy to understand. Puts a lot of weight in a few assignments so its easy to not do well, especially with her specific format for exams. Not approachable in office.

Professor Nelson is amazing!! She lectured very smoothly, and used tophat to engage rather than test. She chose interesting readings, and made class expectations really clear (she released exam and final review packets which were super helpful). I always looked forward to class, and would encourage everyone to take a class with her.

I came into this class being very interested in the topic and the professor is very nice, however BEWARE of the TA you get and grading. The grades really do matter. So if you do poorly on the midterm, you might have to get 100% on everything else to recover. It's unfortunate because I was interested in this class and the grading policy ruined it.

All I can say, is I was 0.02% away from an A at the end of the semester and she refused to round it. She was an excellent professor, besides the fact that she may not care about her students or their GPA.
easy class w a really enjoyable prof. Nicole knows her stuff, is very organized, a great speaker, and entertaining! Enjoyed this class
